name: NMN Pro - Steady Energy (Q1)
learnings: Ad headline and landing-page headline both led with 'cellular energy'. Tight promise-to-landing alignment drove strong conversion. Avoided dramatic anti-aging language.

name: D3+K2 - Immunity (Q1)
learnings: Clear functional benefit, modest claims, consistent message across ad and page.

name: NMN Pro - Bold Promise Test (Q4)
learnings: A high-CTR 'younger' hook lifted clicks but conversion fell sharply because the landing page did not back the promise. The angle was discontinued.
